payload.label: table lamp
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped table lamp about 0.7 m from the camera: tapered beige/off-white fabric shade lit with warm light (visible seams) sitting on a dark turned metal/bronze decorative stem and square wooden plinth base; shade shows a small irregular/tear-like edge on the left and the lamp is captured from a slightly low frontal angle.
attributes: small irregular/tear on left shade edge
